Title: Requires an annual report on the New York state college choice tuition savings program and the translation of vital documents in the most common non-English languages
Summary: Requires an annual report on the New York state college choice tuition savings program to be delivered to the governor and the legislature and posted on the comptroller's website and the translation of vital documents in the most common non-English languages.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the education law, in relation to requiring an annual report on the New York state college choice tuition savings program and the translation of vital documents in the most common non-English languages
